text: Freezing ray deals damage and freezes entities for 7 seconds. If it hits water, it turns it into ice, and if it hits lava, it turns it into obsidian.
Ice attack when used attacks with blocks of ice.
Ice trap freezes the player indefinitely until he takes any type of damage (player can jump).
Fracture: 20% chance on attack to apply "Slowness III" for 10 sec and deal +50% damage.
